title: Sweet & Gooey Whole Wheat Stir-fry
description: A sweet and gooey whole wheat stir-fry dish perfect for a solo dinner in the spirit of Malaysian cuisine. It's vegan-friendly and can be made to suit various dietary restrictions.

ingredients.name: Eggs
ingredients.notes: Use egg whites only for a vegan version.

instructions: Preheat your wok or large skillet over high heat.
In a mixing bowl, combine whole wheat flour, sugar, soy sauce, ginger paste, salt, and water. Mix until it forms a sticky dough.
Add egg whites to the mixture and stir until combined well.
Pour the entire mixture into the hot wok and cook for about 2-3 minutes or until fully cooked and golden brown.
Drizzle with vegetable oil and continue cooking over medium heat for another 1 minute to ensure everything is gooey and evenly coated.
Serve immediately while hot and enjoy your sweet and gooey whole wheat stir-fry!
